item.title: The Bridge Climb is the most sought after Sydney attraction.
item.description: Tomorrow I will be climbing the bridge of Sydney, 134 m above sea, so wish me good luck (the weather was quite strange in the last 3 days). I will be put my pic online, but for the moment you can watch the gallery here. The Bridge Climb is the most sought after Sydney attraction. It takes you along the upper span of the arch on catwalks and ladders all the way to the summit, 134 meters above Sydney Harbor.
